/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/ElectricStatusD.name: 瓶装闪电
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/ElectricStatusD.desc: 为所有武器增加25%的异常状态伤害和电击异常状态伤害。

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/OvershieldCap.name: 硬质化
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/OvershieldCap.desc: 过载护盾上限增加50%。击杀时恢复50点护盾。

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/EnergyOrbToAbil.name: 极限拓展
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/EnergyOrbToAbil.desc: 拾取能量球时增加10%技能范围，持续10秒。

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/HealingEffects.name: Emergency Medicine
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/HealingEffects.desc: All restoration effects by Orb pickups increased by 25%

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/GasChanceToPrim.name: 毒气弹头
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/GasChanceToPrim.desc: 主要武器和次要武器增加25%毒气触发几率。

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/CompanionDamage.name: 好兄弟
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/CompanionDamage.desc: 魅影和同伴的伤害增加250%。

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/RadiationProcOn.name: 精神反击
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/RadiationProcOn.desc: 受到伤害时有10%的几率触发250伤害、5米范围的辐射爆炸。

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/MeleeCritChance.name: 熟能生巧
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/MeleeCritChance.desc: 增加20%近战暴击几率（重击时x2）。

name.name: 电能飞跃
name.desc: 旋身飞跃落地时增加50%电击伤害，持续5秒。

name.name: 常旅客
name.desc: Reload Speed, Fire Rate, Casting Speed and Melee Attack Speed is increased by 100% whie airborne

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/AttackAndMoveme.name: Hit'N'Split
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/AttackAndMoveme.desc: Critical melee hits have a chance to increase attack and movement speed by 5% for 10s.

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/ElectricDamageP.name: 电势积累
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/ElectricDamageP.desc: 每移动1米可获得1电击伤害。攻击会消耗10%的累积伤害。

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/MagnetStatusPul.name: 吸引力
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/MagnetStatusPul.desc: 磁力异常状态会将1米范围内的敌人拉近，每层磁力异常状态将增加1米范围。

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/MagnitizeWithin.name: 磁场威胁
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/MagnitizeWithin.desc: 每施放第5次技能都会对前方50米内的敌人造成磁力异常状态。

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/PowerStrengthAn.name: 能量过载
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/PowerStrengthAn.desc: 施放技能时，每消耗一点能量值，技能强度增加2%，技能效率减少1%，持续5秒。

name.name: 有福同享
name.desc: 每施放10次技能，玩家和友军获得一次不消耗能量的技能施放机会。

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/FinisherChanceP.name: 杀意连段
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/FinisherChanceP.desc: 连击倍率将增加敌人在受到近战攻击后进入可处决状态的几率。每层倍率提高5%几率，使用凯旋之爪Prime时最大可达65%。

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/EnergyWavesOnCo.name: Combo Wave
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/EnergyWavesOnCo.desc: Upon gaining 7x combo multiplier all melee attacks fire off waves of energy

name.name: 重型标枪
name.desc: 近战重击会发射一枚范围为3米、基础伤害为1000的广域标枪，并受到连击倍率加成。

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/MeleeSlideFowar.name: 斩筋断骨
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/MeleeSlideFowar.desc: 每次近战滑行攻击都会增加5%滑行攻击暴击几率，20%滑行速度，同时减少10%滑行摩擦力，持续10秒。最多可叠加10层。

name.name: Copy & Paste
name.desc: Create a spectral clone of a random currently active specter or companion every 125 energy spent

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/CompanionsRadia.name: 辐射支援
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/CompanionsRadia.desc: 魅影或同伴的攻击有25%的几率触发辐射异常状态。

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/CompanionsBuffN.name: 人多势众
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/CompanionsBuffN.desc: 20米范围内每名非Tenno友军增加5%近战攻击速度和20%射速。

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/ReviveEnemyAsSp.name: 救赎契机
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/ReviveEnemyAsSp.desc: 敌人死亡时每有一层异常状态增加1%几率复活为友军，持续30秒。

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/ExplodingHealth.name: 劣质医疗
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/ExplodingHealth.desc: 生命球拾取后会产生范围10米的爆炸，伤害附近的敌人. 每击中一个敌人，获得50护甲，持续30秒

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/GenerateOmniOrb.name: 强制输血
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/GenerateOmniOrb.desc: 弱点击杀有25%几率生成通用补给球。

name.name: Powered Shields
name.desc: Energy Orbs grant +100 shields and Overshield.

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/OrbsDuplicateOn.name: Targeted Medicine
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/OrbsDuplicateOn.desc: Shoot Health Orbs to collect them. Health Orbs now have a 25% chance to duplicate on pickup

name.name: 累积弹匣
name.desc: 每射击1次增加1%触发几率，装填时重置。

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/RefundBulletOnS.name: Free Shot
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/RefundBulletOnS.desc: Triggering a status proc has a 10% chance to reload the triggering bullet into the clip

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/BlastEveryXShot.name: 爆炸派对
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/BlastEveryXShot.desc: 每第10次射击命中时造成10层爆炸异常状态。

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/GuidingMissiles.name: Tickshots
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/GuidingMissiles.desc: Shots gain a 10% chance to fire a seeking projectile for each successful hit. Firing weapons reduces the chance by 5%
